callouts.text: The framing is strong, but the recommended path still has to be inferred from the cards rather than stated up front.
callouts.label: Recommendation buried

callouts.text: This reads like the default human path, but it does not get stronger visual priority than the other install methods.
callouts.label: Should lead

callouts.text: The bookmarklet pill pulls attention well, but the CSP limitation sits lower in the copy and is easy to miss.
callouts.label: Important caveat
